item.title: Xiaomi, unlike Google and Samsung, thinks camera hardware comes first
item.description:
Source: The Verge
When it launched the 17 and 17 Ultra in Europe on Saturday, Xiaomi bucked an industry trend: it didn't really talk about AI all that much. And it really didn't talk about AI when it showed off the two phones' cameras, including a special edition 17 Ultra co-created with Leica. According to Angus Ng, the […]
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: No one has a good plan for how AI companies should work with the government
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
As OpenAI transitions from a wildly successful consumer startup into a piece of national security infrastructure, the company seems unequipped to manage its new responsibilities.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), startup(+2)

item.title: All of Amazon’s kid-friendly Kindles are on sale, including the color version
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Let me let you in on a little secret: Amazon’s kid-friendly e-readers are a better deal than the standard models. Each so-called “Kids” device is identical to its non-Kids counterpart, except that it comes with a protective case, an extended two-year warranty against damage, and six months of Amazon Kids Plus. They also include optional […]
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: We played Pokémon Pokopia, ask us anything
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Pokémon's 30th anniversary is here and Nintendo (and The Pokémon Company, Game Freak, and Omega Force) are kicking things off with a surprisingly excellent life simulation spinoff game. Pokémon Pokopia arrives on March 5th, and it's one of the first Pokémon titles that will debut exclusively on the Nintendo Switch 2. Equal parts Animal Crossing, […]
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Blue Prince headlines Nintendo’s lineup of Switch 2 indie games
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Following a Direct in February and a Pokémon-focused event last week, Nintendo returned today with a showcase focused on indie games. And it ended with a big one: the absorbing, room-shifting puzzle game Blue Prince is launching on the Switch 2. Even better, it'll be available later today. The rest of the titles revealed during […]
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Apple announces M5 MacBook Air and updated MacBook Pro
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple is launching an upgraded MacBook Air featuring the M5 chip along with new MacBook Pro models featuring the M5 Pro and M5 Max. Announced on Tuesday, the new Macs will all be available for preorder starting March 4th with availability in stores starting March 11th. In addition to the M5 chip, the new MacBook […]
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Instagram tracked growing usage while targeting teens, lawyers argue
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The company said usage grew from 40 minutes per day in 2023 to 46 minutes in 2026. Other documents referenced teens as being a top priority for the app before asking existing users for birthdays.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: A married founder duo’s company, 14.ai, is replacing customer support teams at startups
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
14.ai also launched a consumer brand to understand how much AI can handle customer support tasks.
Matched: ai(+3), startup(+2), launch(+2)

item.title: Scott Pilgrim creator Bryan Lee O’Malley on taking ‘another run’ with new game
item.description:
Source: The Verge
It's been a busy few years for Scott Pilgrim. Following a live-action film and the conclusion of the comics in 2010, the series has slowly been coming back to life. First, in 2021 Scott Pilgrim vs. The World: The Game was rereleased on modern consoles after years of being inaccessible. Two years later came an […]
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Why is SpaceX going public?
item.description:
Source: The Verge
I am excited about the SpaceX IPO for all the reasons investors shouldn't be. Maybe it'll be a real marquee moment for Silicon Valley, but I see the potential for a shitshow. After all, more than a decade ago, Musk said that SpaceX going public before going to Mars would be bad for the company. […]
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Apple launches M5 Pro and M5 Max chips
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple has just announced two new processors: the M5 Pro and M5 Max. The new chips will power the MacBook Pro it revealed on Tuesday, offering an 18-core CPU and a new "Fusion Architecture" that integrates two 3nm dies into a single system-on-a-chip (SoC). The CPU's 18-core setup includes six "super" cores and 12 new […]
Matched: launch(+2)

item.title: India’s Pronto formalizes house help as its valuation jumps 8x in under a year
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Pronto handles 18,000 daily bookings and plans rapid expansion as it races rivals to digitize India's largely offline home services market.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Stripe wants to turn your AI costs into a profit center
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Stripe released a preview intended to allow AI companies to easily track, pass through, and make a profit on underlying AI model fees.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Geopolitical drama reportedly stalls IPO of SoftBank-backed PayPay
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The Japan-based company reportedly aimed for a public valuation of at least ¥1.5 trillion ($10 billion).
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Users are ditching ChatGPT for Claude — here’s how to make the switch
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Following controversies surrounding ChatGPT, many users are ditching the AI chatbot for Claude instead. Here's how to make the switch.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Paramount+ and HBO Max to merge into one streaming service after WBD deal closes
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Ellison reassured investors that HBO’s identity and creative vision as a studio would remain unchanged, stating, “Our viewpoint is HBO should stay HBO.”
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply-chain risk
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of Defense to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: X adds ‘Paid Partnership’ labels so creators can ditch the hashtags
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The new labels comply with regulations and allow creators to be more transparent with their followers.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Hacktivists claim to have hacked Homeland Security to release ICE contract data
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
A hacking group called Department of Peace said they hacked a specific office within Homeland Security to protest ICE’s mass deportation campaign, and the companies aiding it.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Cursor has reportedly surpassed $2B in annualized revenue
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The four-year-old startup saw its revenue run rate double over the past three months, according to one Bloomberg source.
Matched: startup(+2)

item.title: Apple speeds up the iPad Air with an M4 upgrade, starting at $599
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Apple refreshes the iPad Air with the M4 chip and more memory to make it better for AI use cases.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Apple bakes in AI smarts into its new $599 iPhone 17e
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The base model comes with 256 GB of storage, which Apple says is twice the entry storage from the previous generation at the same starting price.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Apple’s new Studio displays come with Thunderbolt 5
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The new displays come with better cameras, new sound systems, and Thunderbolt 5 ports.

item.title: Apple unveils M5 Pro and M5 Max chips with new ‘Fusion Architecture’
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The chips are engineered around Apple's new Fusion Architecture, an advanced design that merges two dies into a single, high-performance system on a chip (SoC).
